title: Perform site investigation activities
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform site investigation activities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for on-site operations

pcs.text: Confirm details of the job, location, work instructions, appropriate sampling/test procedures and safety requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm details of the job, location, work instructions, appropriate sampling/test procedures and safety requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm details of the job, location, work instructions, appropriate sampling/test procedures and safety requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify likely site hazards, personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures that are specified for the job and materials used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify likely site hazards, personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures that are specified for the job and materials used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify likely site hazards, personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures that are specified for the job and materials used.

pcs.text: Collect, check and stow all tools, equipment and materials required at the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, check and stow all tools, equipment and materials required at the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, check and stow all tools, equipment and materials required at the site.

pcs.text: Confirm site access requirements, such as entry permits and participate in safety induction as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site access requirements, such as entry permits and participate in safety induction as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site access requirements, such as entry permits and participate in safety induction as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for on-site operations

elements.title: Conduct excavation of boreholes, test pits and/or trenches

pcs.text: Confirm specified sampling/testing locations with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm specified sampling/testing locations with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm specified sampling/testing locations with supervisor.

pcs.text: Excavate to the specified sampling/testing depth, minimising disturbance and potential contamination of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate to the specified sampling/testing depth, minimising disturbance and potential contamination of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate to the specified sampling/testing depth, minimising disturbance and potential contamination of the site.

pcs.text: Ensure materials from different strata are kept separate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure materials from different strata are kept separate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure materials from different strata are kept separate.

pcs.text: Identify materials and record changes of the strata and the test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify materials and record changes of the strata and the test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify materials and record changes of the strata and the test results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct excavation of boreholes, test pits and/or trenches

elements.title: Conduct site sampling

pcs.text: Prepare and check sampling equipment and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and check sampling equipment and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and check sampling equipment and materials.

pcs.text: Take disturbed and undisturbed samples as directed and in accordance with workplace methods and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take disturbed and undisturbed samples as directed and in accordance with workplace methods and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take disturbed and undisturbed samples as directed and in accordance with workplace methods and procedures.

pcs.text: Label samples and record samples/site conditions in accordance with workplace methods and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label samples and record samples/site conditions in accordance with workplace methods and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label samples and record samples/site conditions in accordance with workplace methods and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct site sampling

elements.title: Conduct site testing

pcs.text: Conduct pre-use checks of test equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-use checks of test equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-use checks of test equipment.

pcs.text: Perform basic tests as directed and in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform basic tests as directed and in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform basic tests as directed and in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record data in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record data in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record data in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and seek advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and seek advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and seek advice.

elements.title: Complete site operations

pcs.text: Reinstate the site in accordance with instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reinstate the site in accordance with instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reinstate the site in accordance with instructions.

pcs.text: Clean all equipment (and vehicle as necessary) avoiding environmental damage, stormwater contamination or spread of pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean all equipment (and vehicle as necessary) avoiding environmental damage, stormwater contamination or spread of pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean all equipment (and vehicle as necessary) avoiding environmental damage, stormwater contamination or spread of pests.

pcs.text: Check all equipment and materials prior to re-stowing them for safe transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check all equipment and materials prior to re-stowing them for safe transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check all equipment and materials prior to re-stowing them for safe transport.

pcs.text: Handle and transport samples in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and transport samples in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and transport samples in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of tasks and prior to leaving site (if unsupervised)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of tasks and prior to leaving site (if unsupervised)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of tasks and prior to leaving site (if unsupervised).

pcs.text: Check serviceability of test equipment before storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check serviceability of test equipment before storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check serviceability of test equipment before storage.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete site operations

elements.title: Maintain records

pcs.text: Record details of site sampling, testing and material types in accordance with workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of site sampling, testing and material types in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.title: Maintain a safe work environment

pcs.text: Use safe work procedures and PPE to ensure personal safety and that of others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe work procedures and PPE to ensure personal safety and that of others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe work procedures and PPE to ensure personal safety and that of others.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste.

pcs.text: Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures.
